entity.summary: Colorado-linked U.S. bitcoin seller and broker platform launched in November 2012. BTCQuick enabled customers to buy bitcoin through card and cash-related payment channels and was reported to have processed nearly USD 2 million in sales by October 2013; HEI retains inactive status because no definitive shutdown announcement or terminal date has been established.
entity.notes: BTCQuick was a broker / retail bitcoin seller rather than a conventional order-book exchange. Contemporary reporting establishes a November 2012 launch and active sales in 2013, but the reviewed evidence still does not establish a clean closure notice, cessation date, acquisition, or successor. Keep inactive rather than forcing a dead classification.

expected.summary: US-focused bitcoin seller / broker platform launched around November 2012. CoinDesk and Cointelegraph reported in October 2013 that BTCQuick had reached nearly $2 million in bitcoin sales. HEI models BTCQuick as inactive because the current evidence set supports historical operation but does not establish a definitive shutdown announcement or terminal date.
expected.notes: BTCQuick appears closer to a broker / retail bitcoin seller than a conventional order-book exchange. It is included as a historical exchange-like bitcoin buying platform and kept inactive rather than dead because no clean terminal shutdown evidence is currently attached.

events.title: BTCQuick launched as a U.S. bitcoin seller
events.description: BTCQuick began operating in November 2012 as a U.S.-focused platform for customers to purchase bitcoin through retail payment channels.
events.notes: November 1 is used as a month-level marker because contemporary reporting establishes November 2012 but not one definitive launch day.

evidence.title: Bitcoin seller btcQuick hits nearly $2 Million in sales
evidence.notes: Contemporary profile stating that BTCQuick launched in November 2012 and describing its U.S. broker / seller operation.

evidence.title: btcQuick – the Quickest Bitcoin Seller
evidence.notes: Contemporary secondary confirmation of the November 2012 launch and nearly USD 2 million sales milestone.
